query: Can you help me create a one-week travel itinerary for two people, starting in Tulsa and visiting three different cities in Missouri from March 14th till March 20th, 2022? Our budget is $8,800 and we would like to have private rooms for our accommodations.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Tulsa to Kansas City
plan.attraction: Science City;National WWI Museum and Memorial;The Nelson-Atkins Museum of Art;
plan.accommodation: Beautiful large floor-through apartment, Kansas City

plan.attraction: Kemper Museum of Contemporary Art;Arabia Steamboat Museum;Worlds of Fun;
plan.accommodation: Beautiful large floor-through apartment, Kansas City

plan.current_city: from Kansas City to Cape Girardeau
plan.transportation: self-driving, from Kansas City to Cape Girardeau
plan.attraction: Cape River Heritage Museum;Cape Safari Park;Cape Woods Conservation Area;
plan.accommodation: Nice and Comfortable Private Room, Cape Girardeau

plan.attraction: Discovery Playhouse;Levi's Adventure Trail;Cape Splash Family Aquatic Center;
plan.accommodation: Nice and Comfortable Private Room, Cape Girardeau

plan.current_city: from Cape Girardeau to St. Louis
plan.transportation: self-driving, from Cape Girardeau to St. Louis
plan.breakfast: The Latitude - Radisson Blu, St. Louis
plan.attraction: The Gateway Arch;Saint Louis Zoo;City Museum;
plan.dinner: Wai Yu Mun Ching, St. Louis
plan.accommodation: Lux 2Bed/2.5Bath Central Park Views, St. Louis

plan.attraction: Missouri Botanical Garden;St. Louis Art Museum;Forest Park;
plan.accommodation: Lux 2Bed/2.5Bath Central Park Views, St. Louis

plan.transportation: Flight F3954999, from St. Louis to Tulsa
